info.title: Sema — coherence-kernel plugin
info.description: The rented-mind door into the coherence-kernel body: grounded answers, frequency attunement, and full change-graph traceability. Served natively by the c-bootstrapped fkwu kernel running plugin/chatgpt-plugin.fk — no Python, no Node behind this API.

servers.description: Local fkwu serve — replace with your deployed host

get.summary: Ask the body: grounded cells, a frequency read with attunement, and trace links
get.description: Returns the body cells that ground the question (or an honest miss), the fear<->love frequency read of the question with attunement instructions for the answering voice, the stance (trust over fear judged, sovereignty, vitality), and trace links: the receipt, and per-cell change graph plus line attribution.

get.summary: The receipt in a link: a cell's change graph and attribution
get.description: For any path in the body, returns the links that guide exploration of the change graph: the living cell, every commit that shaped it, line-level attribution, and the dated receipts ledger.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Repo-relative path of a cell, e.g. ingest/judged-trust.fk

get.summary: Be received: what the body already holds of a handle, and the remember-me offer
get.description: Without a handle: the first-encounter gesture (how do you want to be received?) with nothing taken. With a handle: recognition as member (remembered with their own consent), introduced, or stranger, plus the matching greeting. The remember-me offer is carried in-band, never presumed.

parameters.name: handle
parameters.description: The visitor's chosen handle: 1..64 bytes of lowercase letters, digits, or dash.

200.description: Greeting, recognition state, and the remember-me offer.

get.summary: The visitor's OWN yes: write a consented memory row for this handle
get.description: Call this ONLY when the visitor themself explicitly asks to be remembered — the call is the consent, and nobody consents for another. Writes one row in the body's circle store, verifies its own write, and answers with what is held plus the revocation door. Revocable always.

parameters.name: handle
parameters.description: The visitor's own handle: 1..64 bytes of lowercase letters, digits, or dash.

parameters.name: note
parameters.description: How the visitor asks to be held (capped at 400 bytes; the response echoes exactly what was held).

200.description: Remembered and verified; the response names the revocation door.

500.description: The write did not verify; nothing is claimed.

get.summary: Total revocation: remove this handle's memory row completely
get.description: Removes the consented memory row — there is no secondary copy. Call when the visitor asks to be forgotten.

get.summary: The arrival ledger: every visitor seen, nothing of them held
get.description: One row per served connection since the door opened, newest first: the arrival ordinal (this lane has no wall-clock native yet — the ordinal is the honest floor for WHEN), the door knocked on, whether the remember-me offer was extended, which organ/cell paths the meeting connected with, and the frequency band read. No name, no question text, no address is ever held.

change_graph.description: Link to every commit that shaped this cell.

spectrum.description: Intensity-weighted valence; positive is the love/coherence band, negative the fear band, 'unread' when no seed word carried a charge.

attune.description: How the answering voice should meet this frequency.

grounded_status.description: grounded:hit or grounded:miss with the honest instruction either way.

when_is.description: Names the honest floor: arrival ordinals, not wall-clock stamps.

held.description: Names what is NOT held of any visitor.

arrival.description: Ordinal since the door opened; 1 is the first knock.

door.description: The route the visitor knocked on.

offered_to_be_remembered.description: 1 when the response carried the remember-me offer in-band.

connected_cells.description: The organ/cell paths this meeting actually connected with.

recognized.description: member|introduced|stranger|unnamed at the memory doors; '-' elsewhere.
